posts.author: Soporte (Fidel Diaz)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like there to be a column that extracts the url of the element is done manually and is very useful to share a specific piece of data but it would be more useful if there was a formula or column that extracts it to speed up time, if it is not too much to ask that just like the url of the form could be shortened this would make it easier to pass information and the link opens the element directly and save search time.
